[vc_row type=”full_width_content” full_screen_row_position=”middle” column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” scene_position=”center” text_color=”dark” text_align=”left” row_border_radius=”none” row_border_radius_applies=”bg” row_position_desktop=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” overlay_strength=”0.3″ gradient_direction=”left_to_right” shape_divider_position=”bottom” bg_image_animation=”none”][vc_column column_padding=”padding-5-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”2/3″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]

Helijet Charters has the people, expertise, and equipment to meet your flight requirements.

Did you know, in addition to Helijet’s daily scheduled flights between our Metro Vancouver and Vancouver Island terminals, we can also help coordinate your custom charter?

Helijet can help provide custom charter aerial support for business or pleasure.  Let us find solutions for your getaway, corporate retreat, industrial needs, filming, sightseeing, and much more.

Helijet has over 35 years of experience operating within the Pacific North-West environment, and ready to take off from our bases in Richmond-YVR, Vancouver Harbour, Victoria Harbour, Nanaimo Harbour, Prince Rupert or Sandspit-Haida Gwaii.

The Helijet Fleet includes:
Helicopters:                            Corporate Jets:                  
Eurocopter AS350 AStar       Cessna Citation X
Sikorsky S76                            Learjet 31A

 

*To help us provide you with a prompt and detailed reply, please be sure that your email included the following details:

     

    At this time, Helijet Charters does not offer tickets for single-seat sightseeing tours or excursions, ask us about scenic charter flights.

     

    *Any non-airport/heliport destinations or departure points may require at least 60 days lead time for permits to be applied for and permissions granted by Transport Canada and other stakeholders. Any requests within that time frame may not be actioned.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”padding-5-percent” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”left” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ background_image=”344″ background_image_type=”default” background_image_position=”center center” background_image_stacking=”default” background_image_loading=”default” column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/3″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
